title: Laurence Llewelyn-Bowen Velvet Cushion – Blush Pink Luxury Throw Pillow – 43x43cm Soft Decorative Cushion with Filling – Montrose Collection – Elegant Accent for Sofa, Bed or Chair
availability_text: Only 1 left in stock (more on the way).
features: Introduce a touch of luxury and glamour to your home, lavish love on your lounge or bring bliss to your bedroom with this timeless, soft to the touch velvet filled cushion from the Laurence Llewelyn-Bowen Collection.
A stunning home soft-furnishings collection designed by Laurence Llewelyn-Bowen, featuring his trademark style of elegance and love of a little decadence for a luxurious style.
43x43cm (17x17") square cushion with filling pad( Zip opening to allow removal of filling pad)
Pack Contents: 1 x Cushion (with 100% polyester filling pad) . Complete the look by buying the matching Laurence Llewelyn-Bowen Montrose curtains.
description: Introduce a touch of luxury and glamour to your home, lavish love on your lounge or bring bliss to your bedroom with these timeless, soft to the touch velvet curtains from the Laurence Llewelyn-Bowen Sleeping Beauty Collection. Guaranteed to add colour, depth, and opulence to your space these stunning blackout coated drapes are easy to hang and will not only beautifully frame your windows but will also manage light, reduce noise and help to keep your home warm and inviting. Add the matching cushion to add the finishing touch and complete the look.

specifications_table.Care instructions: ‎Cushion Cover Machine Wash. Do not wash the padding filling.
specifications_table.Included components: ‎1 x Cushion Cover with filling pad inside
